questions.text: Provide a brief description of your organisation, and specify what, if any, commercial relationship(s) your business or organisation has with Transocean and/or Valaris.

questions.section: Questions for customers of offshore contract drilling services
questions.text: Describe the factors you consider when selecting an offshore contract drilling services provider and whether there are any factors unique to the Australian market.

questions.section: Questions for customers of offshore contract drilling services
questions.text: Describe how closely Transocean and Valaris compete in the supply of offshore contract drilling services in Australia, including with reference to their rig fleet composition (jackups, semisubmersibles and drillships).

questions.section: Questions for customers of offshore contract drilling services
questions.text: Identify any alternative suppliers of offshore contract drilling services that viably meet your organisation’s offshore contract drilling requirements. Please describe how closely they compete with Transocean and Valaris, including by reference to factors such as availability, capabilities, price and quality.

questions.section: Questions for customers of offshore contract drilling services
questions.text: Provide the following details in relation to each completed request for tender or other bidding process you have conducted since 1 January 2021 in Australia, using the table below.

questions.section: Questions for customers of offshore contract drilling services
questions.text: Describe whether your organisation can self-supply offshore contract drilling services, and/or sponsor new entry or expansion into the supply of these services in Australia. Please also outline the circumstances under which you would consider such strategies.

questions.section: Questions for suppliers of offshore contract drilling services
questions.text: Describe the offshore contract drilling services your organisation supplies and in which geographic regions.

questions.section: Questions for suppliers of offshore contract drilling services
questions.text: Provide details of the rigs you own globally which can deliver offshore contract drilling services, using the table below.

questions.section: Questions for suppliers of offshore contract drilling services
questions.text: Please list the tenders you have participated in, in the previous 3 years in Australia. Include details such as customer, location, rig type, project duration.

questions.section: Questions for suppliers of offshore contract drilling services
questions.text: Describe the height of barriers to entry and/or expansion in the supply of offshore contract drilling services in Australia, including by reference to costs (such as capital expenditure and regulatory requirements), availability of necessary inputs, timing, experience in Australia, and any other factors.

Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition, including any views on the effect of the Acquisition on competition in Australia.
